title_en: Methodology: Applying Hadith Criticism to Biography
title_ar: المنهج: توظيف نقد الحديث في الترجمة
title_id: Metodologi: Menerapkan Kritik Hadis pada Biografi
content_en:
The most distinctive feature of Tabyin Kadhib al-Muftari is its application of hadith criticism methodology to the biographical tradition surrounding al-Ash'ari and the Ash'ari school. Ibn Asakir was one of the leading hadith scholars of his age, thoroughly trained in the evaluation of chains of transmission (isnad) and the assessment of individual narrators. He brought this expertise to bear on the accounts being circulated about al-Ash'ari.

The critics of the Ash'ari school had circulated various accounts: that al-Ash'ari had died without repenting of his kalam innovations, that certain Hanbali scholars had condemned him, that he had contradicted the positions of the early community on fundamental questions. Ibn Asakir examined each of these accounts using the same criteria he would apply to hadith: Who transmitted this account? Was the transmitter reliable and present at the reported event? Are there multiple independent chains confirming the account, or does it rest on a single unreliable source? Does the account contradict more reliable evidence?

Applying these criteria, Ibn Asakir found that many of the negative accounts about al-Ash'ari were poorly transmitted, rested on unreliable narrators, or contradicted accounts with stronger chains. He documented these findings in detail, providing the chains of transmission for each account he evaluated and explaining his reasoning for accepting or rejecting it.

The application of hadith methodology to biographical accounts was not invented by Ibn Asakir but he applied it with unusual systematic rigor in Tabyin Kadhib al-Muftari. His demonstration that the negative tradition about al-Ash'ari could not withstand the scrutiny of proper hadith criticism methods was rhetorically powerful precisely because it used tools that Hanbali hadith scholars themselves acknowledged as authoritative.

This methodological move — defending theological positions by applying the traditionalist school's own scholarly tools rather than purely philosophical arguments — is characteristic of Ibn Asakir's intellectual approach. He was a defender of Ash'ari theology who preferred to make his case with the weapons of historical and hadith scholarship rather than purely with kalam arguments.
content_id:
Ciri paling khas dari Tabyin Kadhib al-Muftari adalah penerapan metodologi kritik hadis terhadap tradisi biografi seputar al-Asy'ari dan mazhab Asy'ari. Ibn Asakir adalah salah satu ulama hadis terkemuka zamannya, yang terlatih secara mendalam dalam evaluasi sanad (rantai periwayatan) dan penilaian perawi individu. Ia menerapkan keahlian ini pada riwayat-riwayat yang beredar tentang al-Asy'ari.

Para pengkritik mazhab Asy'ari telah menyebarkan berbagai riwayat: bahwa al-Asy'ari meninggal dunia tanpa bertaubat dari inovasi kalamnya, bahwa ulama-ulama Hanbali tertentu telah mengecamnya, bahwa ia telah bertentangan dengan pendapat komunitas awal dalam masalah-masalah mendasar. Ibn Asakir memeriksa setiap riwayat ini menggunakan kriteria yang sama yang akan ia terapkan pada hadis: Siapa yang meriwayatkan laporan ini? Apakah perawi tersebut dapat dipercaya dan hadir pada peristiwa yang dilaporkan? Apakah ada beberapa sanad independen yang mengkonfirmasi riwayat tersebut, atau apakah ia bergantung pada satu sumber yang tidak dapat dipercaya? Apakah riwayat tersebut bertentangan dengan bukti yang lebih andal?

Dengan menerapkan kriteria-kriteria ini, Ibn Asakir menemukan bahwa banyak riwayat negatif tentang al-Asy'ari lemah periwayatannya, bergantung pada perawi yang tidak dapat dipercaya, atau bertentangan dengan riwayat-riwayat yang memiliki sanad lebih kuat. Ia mendokumentasikan temuan-temuan ini secara terperinci, menyertakan sanad untuk setiap riwayat yang ia evaluasi dan menjelaskan alasannya menerima atau menolaknya.

Penerapan metodologi hadis pada riwayat-riwayat biografi bukan merupakan inovasi Ibn Asakir, namun ia menerapkannya dengan kekakuan sistematis yang tidak biasa dalam Tabyin Kadhib al-Muftari. Pembuktiannya bahwa tradisi negatif tentang al-Asy'ari tidak tahan terhadap pengawasan metode kritik hadis yang benar sangat kuat secara retoris justru karena ia menggunakan alat-alat yang diakui sendiri oleh ulama hadis Hanbali sebagai otoritatif.

Langkah metodologis ini — membela posisi teologis dengan menerapkan alat-alat ilmiah milik mazhab tradisionalis itu sendiri ketimbang argumen-argumen filosofis semata — merupakan ciri khas pendekatan intelektual Ibn Asakir. Ia adalah pembela teologi Asy'ari yang lebih memilih untuk membuktikan kasusnya dengan senjata ilmu sejarah dan hadis daripada semata-mata dengan argumen kalam.
content_ar: The most distinctive feature of Tabyin Kadhib al-Muftari is its application of الحديث criticism methodology to the biographical التراث surrounding al-الأشعري and the الأشعري school. Ibn Asakir was one of the leading الحديث العلماء of his age, thoroughly trained in the evaluation of chains of transmission (الإسناد) and the assessment of individual narrators. He brought this expertise to bear on the accounts being circulated about al-الأشعري. The critics of the الأشعري school had circulated various accounts: that al-الأشعري had died without repenting of his علم الكلام innovations, that certain الحنبلي العلماء had condemned him, that he had contradicted the positions of the early الجماعة on الأساسي questions. Ibn Asakir examined each of these accounts using the same criteria he would apply to الحديث: Who transmitted this account? Was the transmitter reliable and present at the reported event? Are there multiple independent chains confirming the account, or does it rest on a single unreliable source? Does the account contradict more reliable evidence? Applying these criteria, Ibn Asakir found that many of the negative accounts about al-الأشعري were poorly transmitted, rested on unreliable narrators, or contradicted accounts with stronger chains. He documented these findings in detail, providing the chains of transmission for each account he evaluated and explaining his reasoning for accepting or rejecting it. The application of الحديث methodology to biographical accounts was not invented by Ibn Asakir but he applied it with unusual systematic rigor in Tabyin Kadhib al-Muftari. His demonstration that the negative التراث about al-الأشعري could not withstand the scrutiny of proper الحديث criticism methods was rhetorically powerful precisely لأن it used tools that الحنبلي الحديث العلماء themselves acknowledged as المعتمد. This methodological move — defending theological positions by applying the traditionalist school's own العلمي tools rather than purely philosophical arguments — is characteristic of Ibn Asakir's intellectual approach. He was a defender of الأشعري theology who preferred to make his case with the weapons of historical and الحديث scholarship rather than purely with علم الكلام arguments.
